ops.text: capt-hook comments guard blocks Write of cc-guides fragment SOURCES derived from the repo's own pack templates: .claude/fragments/**/install-binary.sh/install-binary.fragment.sh is a byte-level substitution of plugin/guides/sh/install-binary-pinned.sh (whose identical 15-line header comment already lives in-repo, and which cc-context ships verbatim as its rendered artifact), yet the Write was denied as "verbose comment". Worked around legitimately by deriving the fragment with sed from the template (better provenance anyway), but the guard should exempt cc-guides fragment sources / *.fragment.* files — template fidelity is the point there, and hand-shrinking the comment would DRIFT the fragment from the pack template. Framework-owner decision (capt-hook comments hook carve-out), per fix-framework-not-hooks.
